hypothesis: If DFT-refined force fields and a two-stage MD+GCMC simulation oracle are coupled with Bayesian optimization guided by polymer-specific molecular embeddings, then higher-CO2-adsorption polyamines will be discovered with fewer simulations than random or model-agnostic search, even from low-performing initializations, because improved simulation fidelity and informative representations yield more accurate surrogates and more efficient exploration–exploitation.
